title: Parloa打造客户愿意交谈的服务代理
title_en: Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to
summary: Parloa利用OpenAI模型驱动可扩展的语音AI客服代理，使企业能够设计、模拟和部署可靠的实时交互。该平台专注于提升客户服务体验，通过自然语言处理实现高效对话。Parloa leverages OpenAI models to power scalable, voice-driven AI customer service agents, enabling enterprises to design, simulate, and deploy reliable, real-time interactions. The platform focuses on enhancing customer service experience through natural language processing for efficient conversations.
